assets.summary: Weighted pseudo-random distribution for business event allocation. Combines event weighting for business objectives with pseudo-random distribution for fairness.
assets.title: Weighted Pseudo-Random Distribution for Business Event Allocation

assets.summary: Production-ready Python implementation with EventWeighting, PseudoRandomDistribution, and BonusDistributor classes. A/B test: 278% inactive reactivation, 44% fairness improvement, 39% server load reduction.

Full implementation in weighted_prd_solver.py
